inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash, bleeding gums, and decrease in fever are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: These specific symptoms are less common in general viral fevers

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever, which is not seen here

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar bilkul nahin hai, lekin masoodon se abhi bhi khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The prolonged phase of weakness and continued bleeding gums confirm the diagnosis of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
